messages.content:
Dear Friend,

As an add on to compilation of my poetries on www.sajjanksharma.com, I have created my page (http://www.facebook.com/pages/Sajjan-Kumar-Sharma/209733762393362) posted on my wall wherein I would be sharing regularly (on an interval of a day or two) my creations for my true friends like you and your near and dear ones. I hope you would like it and will be in touch on regular basis.

Cheers
Sajjan
